mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (user_name, user_id,user_password, user_email) VALUES (#{username}, #{userid}, #{password}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT user_name FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userid}
SELECT user_email FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userid}
SELECT user_num FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userid}
mapper.update: UPDATE user u JOIN user_privacy p ON u.user_num = p.user_num SET u.user_name = #{username}, u.user_email = #{email}, p.up_gender = #{gender}, p.up_height = #{height}, p.up_weight = #{weight}, p.up_target_weight = #{targetweight}, p.up_age = #{age}, p.up_act = #{act} WHERE u.user_num = #{usernum}
